From properties near the historic Kew Gardens Cinema to homes along tree-canopied streets like Lefferts Boulevard, our team understands the unique pest challenges facing this charming neighborhood.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Kew Gardens?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day wasp removal service in Kew Gardens. Most wasp nest removals are completed within 45-90 minutes, depending on nest size and location. We service all areas of Kew Gardens including properties near Forest Park and the Queens Criminal Court complex.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 wasp removal price include?
faqs.answer: Our pricing includes a thorough inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area, and a 30-day warranty. The final cost depends on factors like nest size, location accessibility, and the number of nests. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my family and pets in Kew Gardens?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted, low-toxicity treatments that are safe for families and pets when applied by our trained professionals. We advise keeping children and pets indoors during treatment and for 2-3 hours afterward. Our methods are especially suited for Kew Gardens' residential areas and garden environments.

faqs.question: When is wasp season in Kew Gardens, Queens?
faqs.answer: Wasp activity in Kew Gardens typically peaks from late spring through early fall (May through October). Late summer (August-September) is when colonies are largest and wasps are most aggressive. We recommend scheduling removal at the first sign of nest building in spring for easier, more affordable treatment.
